nodes.name: 俾斯麦群岛
nodes.summary: 俾斯麦群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括Melanesian megapode、蓝胸鹑、Yellow-legged pigeon等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Buff-faced pygmy parrot
nodes.summary: Buff-faced pygmy parrot（Buff-faced pygmy parrot，学名 Micropsitta pusio），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The buff-faced pygmy parrot (Micropsitta pusio) is a very small green parrot found in subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest in New Britain and New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Buff-faced pygmy parrots are found across the northern lowlands of the island of New Guinea from the west to the southeastern tip up to an altitude around 800 m, as well as in the Bismarck Archipelago
